prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LIE 6.0L V12 (L539) with a fully built, dry-sump version featuring forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a custom titanium valvetrain by Del West (intake/exhaust valves) and upgraded valve springs from Ferrea Racing Components to support 9,500 RPM redline.

Forced Induction: Install a custom twin-turbo system using Garrett GT4202R turbos (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL Sport 44mm wastegates and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup by PWR Performance. Utilize a Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke turbo calibration map and a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup with ID1000cc injectors for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Upgrade to a Quaife ATB differential with a custom 4.22:1 final drive ratio. Install a full Ohlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable dampers, spherical bearing top mounts, and custom valving for the Diablo GT’s unique chassis geometry. Replace the stock half-shafts with CV joints from The Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,200 HP) and a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch with a billet flywheel.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Install a full carbon fiber aero package by Novitec Torado, including a GT3-inspired front splitter with integrated canards, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap, and a fixed rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber elements (3D-printed airfoil profiles for optimal downforce). Replace the stock hood with a one-piece carbon fiber unit from Capristo, featuring dual NACA ducts for intercooler cooling.

Exterior: Apply a custom livery by Foliatec using 3M Matte Graphite vinyl with gloss black accents on the roof, mirrors, and lower body panels. Replace the stock wheels with custom 19x11 front and 20x13 rear forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF15 model) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 ZR19 front, 345/25 ZR20 rear). Add a custom titanium exhaust system by Akrapovic with dual 120mm outlets and carbon fiber tips.

Interior: Retrim the cabin with full Alcantara by Saddleback Leather, including custom door cards, dashboard, and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harnesses). Install a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (chrome-moly steel, TIG-welded) with integrated fire suppression system by SPA Technique. Replace the stock steering wheel with a MOMO Prototipo (flat-bottom, suede) and add a Motec C127 digital dash with configurable shift lights and turbo boost display.
